title: Becoming Us
theme: Love arrives without a formal beginning.
sceneDescription: Chapter 10 is presented as a privacy-safe stylized memoir scene using open horizon, sunset light, quiet distance. The Living Scene Layer supports the memory without changing the manuscript text or recreating real people photorealistically.
privacyNotes: Use privacy-safe, stylized, non-photorealistic character presence. Do not create final faces unless explicitly approved.
